items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of auto-offer upon cancellation.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of an auto-offer when a cancellation occurs, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality. The linked use case focuses on the waitlist and booking confirmation scenarios without addressing the specific behavior of auto-offers in response to cancellations. Therefore, the evidence does not support a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
